basic_details.job_title: CSIR CCMB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Technician, Driver & Technical Officer Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest CSIR-Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology (CSIR-CCMB) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Technical Officer, Technician (1)/Gr.II(1), and Driver posts! Published on 28 April 2026 at www.ccmb.res.in, this new recruitment drive offers 28 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group of 27 to 30 years and possessing a qualification of M.Sc., SSC/10th with ITI, or valid driving license (as per the post) can apply online from 28 April 2026 to 26 May 2026. Find all details about the CSIR-CCMB new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, online form, and notificati

application_fee.details: UR / OBC(NCL) / EWS: Rs. 500/- SC / ST / PwBD / Women / Ex-Servicemen: Nil

age_limit.details: Technical Officer: 30 years Technician (1): 28 years Driver: 27 years | Age relaxation as per CSIR/GoI rules for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen, CSIR employees, etc.

qualification.details: Educational Qualification: | Technical Officer (TO-01): M.Sc. in Hospitality Administration / Hospitality Management with minimum 55% marks. Technician (1) (TE-01, TE-02, TE-03): SSC/10th Standard with Science subjects + ITI Certificate or 2 years Apprentice Training or 3 years experience in relevant trade (Laboratory Assistant, Computer Operator, Food Production etc.). Driver: 10th Standard + Valid Driving Licence for LMV & HMV + 3 years driving experience + Knowledge of motor mechanism.

selection_process: For Technical Officer: Trade Test + Competitive Written Examination (Paper-I
For Technician (1): Trade Test + Competitive Written Examination (Paper-I
For Driver: Skill Test (Qualifying) + Competitive Written Examination
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates are required to apply ONLINE ONLY by visiting CSIR-CCMB website followed by sending hard copy of online application duly signed along with self-attested copies of mark sheets, certificates, etc. No other mode of application will be entertained.
ONLINE APPLICATIONS WITHOUT RECEIPT OF HARD COPY OF THE SAME WILL BE SUMMARILY REJECTED.

Only one application per candidate will be accepted for each postcode. If a candidate submits multiple online applications for the same postcode using different email addresses, only the most recent completed application will be considered.
The Online application will be available on CSIR-CCMB website https://www.ccmb.res.in [opens on 28.04.2026 from 11:00 AM and closes on 26.05.2026 at 11:59 PM]
Candidates are advised to go through the instructions (available on CSIR-CCMB recruitment portal) for filling up of online applications carefully.
Interested candidates are advised to apply in time to avoid last minute rush.

For submission of online applications, the candidates are required to pay a nonrefundable fee of Rs. 500/- (Rupee FIVE Hundred only) through State Bank Collect Click here only. The transaction number/UTR number generated after successful payment of fee is required to be mentioned in the online application. Further, the candidates are required to upload the e-receipt of SB Collect (wherever applicable) and preserve the same for future communication.
Applications without the prescribed fee will not be considered and summarily rejected. No representation against such rejection would be entertained.

In case of universities/institute awarding CGPA/SGPA/OGPA/DGPA/CPI grades etc., candidates are requested to convert the same into percentage based on the formula as per their university/institute and mention the percentage so arrived at the appropriate place inthe online application form, while filling the same.

After completely filling the online application form candidate can submit and take printout of the online generated filled application and note down Application Number for future communication. The candidate must sign the computer generated application while sending the hardcopy of application.

The computer generated online application duly signed by the candidate and accompanied by SELF-ATTESTED copies of the certificates such as mark sheets, testimonials in support of age, education qualifications, experience and caste certificate, if applicable along with one recent passport size self-signed photograph affixed should be sent by post in an envelope super scribed “APPLICATION FOR THE POST OF ____________ (Post Code: ________)” so as to reach the following address on or before 05.06.2026 (06:00 PM) (By hand submission of hard copy will not be accepted).
The Section Officer (Recruitment Section), CSIR-Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology, Uppal Road, Habsiguda, Hyderabad – 500007, Telangana
important_instructions: Online applications without hard copy will be rejected. Candidates can apply for multiple posts but must submit separate applications. All documents must be self-attested. Check the official website regularly for updates, admit cards, and results. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies in CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026 has announced a total of 28 vacancies. These include 23 Technician posts, 1 Driver post, and 4 Technical Officer posts across different departments as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q2. What is the starting date to apply online for CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process for CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026 will begin on 28 April 2026. Candidates are advised to apply early to avoid last-minute technical issues or server delays.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply online for CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026 is 26 May 2026. Candidates must ensure all details are correctly filled before submission to avoid rejection.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any requirement to send a hard copy of the application?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates are required to send a hard copy of the submitted application form. The last date for receipt of the hard copy is 05 June 2026, as mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered under CSIR-CCMB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 39,545 per month for Technician and Driver posts to Rs. 90,100 per month for Technical Officer posts, including allowances as per CSIR norms.
